scope: Add CodeObjectSimdRequirement as a stable CodeObject sub-object
Default current host-validation CodeObjects to explicit scalar-only requirements
Allow CodePublisher to declare a SIMD requirement with an exact TargetFeatureSet ObjectRef
Reject malformed SIMD usage in ContractGraph validation
Expose CodeObject SIMD requirement through CodeObjectManifest and osctl code-object ViewV1
no_goals: real vector register save or restore

findings_fixed: MissingDeclaration is always invalid and cannot satisfy CodeObject SIMD requirement validation
A SIMD requirement must carry required_abi, vector register shape, and a TargetFeatureSet ObjectRef
Wrong object kind is rejected before mutating CodePublisher state
ContractGraph validation checks code->target-feature-set exact generation when present
Current package CodeObjects remain scalar-only instead of falsely claiming SIMD usage
bad_smells_checked: No artifact profile rejection was added in V1
No VectorState or scheduler vector context was introduced
No real SIMD execution or target-side cwasm execution path was added
osctl exposes a stable ViewV1 field instead of dumping internal CodeObject layout
residual_notes: V2 owns rejecting unsupported SIMD requirements against target profile
V3 owns SIMD trap classification and event attribution
V4-V9 own VectorState and preempt/resume/migration behavior

evidence.synthetic_negative_test: missing SIMD declaration produces code->simd-requirement violation

residual_gaps: V2 owns artifact profile rejection for unsupported SIMD
V4-V9 own VectorState and preempt/resume/migration behavior
